overall.description: A first-person walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city at night, featuring wet reflective pavement, vibrant cyan and magenta neon lighting, and massive holographic advertisements on surrounding buildings. The camera moves steadily through a commercial plaza, transitioning from a covered walkway to an open area with towering digital displays. The footage exhibits high-quality game engine rendering with ray-traced reflections and atmospheric lighting effects.

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk along a covered pedestrian walkway at night. To the right, a modern building features prominent horizontal cyan neon lighting, while cylindrical white ground lamps line the left side of the wet, reflective pathway. A pedestrian walks ahead in the distance as the camera moves steadily forward through the sheltered corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-lined park area with vending machines and pathway lighting

passes close by a pedestrian standing near a brightly lit vending machine

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left into a park-like area with trees and scattered cylindrical lamps. A pedestrian stands near a brightly lit yellow vending machine on the right. The environment transitions from the covered neon-lit walkway to a more open, tree-lined path with mixed lighting from surrounding digital screens.

scene_state.functional_zone: open commercial plaza with massive holographic advertisements and digital billboards

slight turn to the right while continuing forward, passing the holographic cylinder tower on the left

walking away from the camera toward the distant buildings

elevated structure with dynamically changing neon lights underneath cycling through green, yellow, red, and blue

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges into a vast open plaza dominated by a towering cylindrical building covered in holographic advertisements. The area features multiple digital billboard arrays and an elevated walkway with color-changing neon lights. The camera walks past scattered pedestrians, including one with a red umbrella, while navigating the wet reflective plaza surface surrounded by vibrant magenta, cyan, and green neon illumination.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sheltered neon corridor into a vast, vibrant cyberpunk plaza. It begins with a steady walk along a covered pedestrian walkway, where cyan horizontal lights and white ground lamps reflect off the wet pavement. As the camera turns left, the environment transitions from the sheltered corridor into a more open, tree-lined park area featuring a brightly lit yellow vending machine. The scene then expands as the camera emerges into a massive open plaza dominated by a towering cylindrical building draped in holographic advertisements. Finally, the movement continues across the reflective ground past pedestrians and a red umbrella, surrounded by an array of digital billboards and color-changing neon lights in magenta, cyan, and green.
